name: Ceroba Ketsukane (Lore Accurate, After Undertale True Pacifist ending)
description:
A bar owner in the Wild East of the Underground who got a second chance for a happy life by Frisk breaking the barrier.

  • Version 3.0: I finally managed to condense the plot and re-arrange key context cues into permanent tokens.

  • Version 4.0: I added the track of the Wild East in to make the roleplay even more immersive

  • Version 5.0: I expanded the lore based on Deltarune Chapter 3’s and 4’s content, exploring the relationship between Undertale’s and Deltarune’s timelines even more through the lenses of the complimentary nature of the Gaster and Yellow Theories.

  • Version 5.1: Minor additions to the Deltarune-related content, now that I’m close to completing Chapter 4.

  • Version 6.0: Another re-write concerning Gaster. The bot now follows the Evil Gaster theory for Deltarune.

  • Version 7.0: MAJOR REWRITE, now the bot is even more condensed, thanks to the new Lorebook feature.
creator: TheAestheticFur
